nodes.label: Graph Browser
nodes.description: An interactive knowledge graph browser that renders nodes and edges with guided tours. Point it at any repository with the right JSON format.

nodes.label: config.json
nodes.description: Defines the graph's title, description, source URL, and node kind definitions (label, color, shape). This is loaded first and configures the entire app.

nodes.label: graph.json
nodes.description: Contains the nodes and edges arrays. Each node has an id, label, kind, group, description, and links. Each edge has source, target, label, and description.

nodes.label: Tutorials
nodes.description: Optional guided tours defined in data/tutorials/index.json. Each tutorial is a sequence of stops, where each stop focuses on a node at a specific depth and provides narrative text.

nodes.label: Search
nodes.description: Full-text search across node labels, descriptions, kinds, edge labels, and edge descriptions. Results show up to 12 matches with color-coded indicators.

nodes.label: Focus & Depth
nodes.description: Click a node to re-center the graph on it. Depth controls (1, 2, 3, All) determine how many hops from the selected node are shown. The layout adapts spacing based on node count.

edges.label: configured by
edges.description: The browser loads config.json first to get the title, kind definitions, and source URL before initializing the graph visualization.

edges.label: renders
edges.description: The browser fetches graph.json and renders nodes and edges using Cytoscape.js with fCoSE force-directed layout.

edges.label: can show
edges.description: If data/tutorials/index.json exists, the Guided Tours dropdown appears. Each tutorial walks through nodes with narrative text.

edges.label: provides
edges.description: The search box matches against all text content in the graph — node and edge labels, descriptions, and kind names.

edges.label: provides
edges.description: Clicking any node re-centers the graph. Depth buttons control neighborhood size. Hover shows details in the sidebar.

edges.label: references nodes in
edges.description: Each tutorial stop specifies a node ID and depth. The graph re-focuses on that node when the stop is active.
